Documentation for this format

Options Sets

Answer options for overview.sponsor

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-sponsor-cs#exercise-physiology ("Exercise Physiology")

Answer options for exercise-prescription.aerobic.modality

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-medical-hardware-cs#t2-treadmill ("T2 Treadmill")
  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-medical-hardware-cs#cevis ("CEVIS Cycle Ergometer")

Answer options for exercise-prescription.resistive.modality

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-medical-hardware-cs#ared ("ARED (Advanced Resistive Exercise Device)")

Answer options for exercise-prescription.resistive.exercises

  • Squat
  • Deadlift
  • Heel Raise
  • Bench Press
  • Shoulder Press
  • Bent Over Row
  • Upright Row

Answer options for weekly-adherence.missed-sessions-reason

  • Operational constraints
  • Equipment issues
  • Crew schedule conflict
  • Medical hold
  • Other

Answer options for data-delivery.archive

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-data-archive-cs#mmis ("Medical Mission Information System")

extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

name: MEDB53ExercisePrescription
title: MEDB 5.3 Exercise Prescription
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for exercise prescription. Documents in-flight exercise countermeasures protocol and adherence.
purpose: To document and track in-flight exercise countermeasures prescription and crew adherence to maintain fitness during long-duration spaceflight.
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

initial.valueString: To prescribe and monitor in-flight exercise countermeasures to prevent cardiovascular, musculoskeletal, and neuromuscular deconditioning during spaceflight.
